title.zh: 微信小程序逆向 IV - 字节码虚拟机与内存转储
title.en: WeChat MiniApp Reverse IV - Bytecode VM and Memory Dump

description.zh: 当小程序采用字节码保护、多层包装壳后，需转向内存级动态逆向分析。
description.en: When MiniApps use bytecode protection and multi-layer wrappers, need to switch to memory-level dynamic reverse analysis.

content.zh: 主流防护现状：V8/QuickJS字节码保护、多层包装壳与自校验、行为与环境指纹检测。
content.en: Current protection status: V8/QuickJS bytecode protection, multi-layer wrappers, behavior fingerprint detection.

content.zh: 核心原则：无论多少层加密，业务明文最终都会在内存中完成组装。
content.en: Core principle: No matter how many layers of encryption, business plaintext will eventually be assembled in memory.

caption.zh: 基于特征值搜索内存明文
拦截send函数获取请求数据
caption.en: Intercept send function to get request data

content.zh: 实战案例：绕过某支付小程序字节码保护。使用Memory.scan搜索业务特征值，提取完整明文JSON。
content.en: Case study: Bypass bytecode protection of payment MiniApp. Use Memory.scan to search business signatures, extract complete plaintext JSON.
